message:
fix(llm): address round 2 review issues in retry and stream-timeout

- Fix timer ordering: clear before yield, restart after (prevents false
  timeouts when consumer is slow to pull values)
- Add AbortSignal support to withStreamReadTimeout
- Add 402 (Payment Required) to NON_RETRYABLE_STATUSES
- Add barrel exports for retry and stream-timeout in src/llm/index.ts
- Add override modifier on StreamReadTimeoutError.name (TS strictness)
- Add comments documenting retry_after and retryable as spec-compliant
  API surface (not dead code)
- Add tests: jitter range verification, maxRetries=0, StreamReadTimeoutError
  retry integration, 402 non-retryable, AbortSignal on stream timeout,
  slow consumer false-timeout prevention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
